tuning: D G C F A D

recommended.song_name: Sure To Fall In Love With You

content:
This is the ultimate Chord chart of this song!!!

Song:Broadway
Band:Goo Goo Dolls
Album:Dizzy Up The Girl

              Tabbed by Vincent Cicchetti

Tuning: DGCFAD Capo 1



Chords Used:
[ch]Am[/ch]:002210
[ch]G[/ch]:320033
[ch]F[/ch]:133211 or xx3211
[ch]Fmaj7[/ch]:1x3210
[ch]C[/ch]:x32010
[ch]Dm[/ch]:x00231


Intro: [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] (3x) [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

Chorus:
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Broadway is dark tonight [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
A little bit weaker than you used to be [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Broadway is dark tonight [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
See the young man sitting [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
In the old man’s bar [/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
Waiting for his turn to die [/tab]

Verse:

[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch] 
The cowboy kills the rock star [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
And Friday night’s gone too far [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
The dim light hides the years [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]             
On all the faded girls [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
Forgotten but not gone [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
You drink it off your mind [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
You talk about the world [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
Like it’s someplace that you’ve been [/tab]









Bridge:
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
You see you’d love to run home [/tab]
But you know you ain’t got one 

[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
And you’re livin’ in a world [/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
That you’re best forgotten around here [/tab]

Chorus:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]

Verse:

[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch] 
You choke down all you’re anger [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Forget your only son [/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
You see you’d love to run home [/tab]
But you know you ain’t got one 

[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Cause you’re livin’ in a world[/tab]
That you’re best forgotten  

[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]

[tab]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]

Vinny says:
Told you so!!  :) :o :)
